entry.title: New: Bill 33, CD1 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2025 BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF MAUI, APPENDIX A, PART II, AFFORDABLE HOUSING FUND, KAIAULU NAPILI" The purpose of this bill is to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 Budget by adding a new condition for up to $650,000 to be used for a grant to A0746 Lahaina, L.P., for pre-development costs for the Kaiaulu O Napili Affordable Housing Project.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
